titles.title: Thank you God for saving me

authors.author: Martin Smith
Martin Smith
Weil du mein Retter bist (Worte sind zu arm)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v5 v6 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What can I give to you What can I offer to the king For all the love you've shown For all your mercy over me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I called your name, you heard my cry Out of the grave, and into life My heart is yours, my soul is free Thank you God for saving me Thank you God for saving me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The rock of salvation My hope is built on nothing less Morning by morning How great is your faithfulness

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I called your name, you heard my cry Out of the grave, and into life My heart is yours, my soul is free Thank you God for saving me Thank you God for saving me Thank you God for saving me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You gave your life upon the cross You suffered once for all You made a way Jesus in victory you rose You made us all your own Now we are saved

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Thank you God for saving me Thank you God Thank you God for saving me Thank you God for the cross Thank you God for saving me, for saving me
